pattern: Selection-sort by flips: repeatedly bring the current maximum to the front with one flip, then flip it down into its final place, shrinking the unsorted prefix each round.
hints: A flip only ever reverses a prefix, so the one tool you have is moving a front-anchored block; think about how to place one element correctly at a time.
To fix the largest unsorted value, first flip it to the very front, then flip the whole unsorted prefix so it lands at the back.

For size from n down to 2, find the index of the max within the first 'size' elements; flip (index+1) to bring it to front, then flip 'size' to send it to its sorted position. Record each flip length.

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    arr = list(range(1, n + 1))
    rng.shuffle(arr)
    return [arr]
stress.note: any permutation is solvable within 10*n flips by selection-by-flip
